**My Dearest Daughter,**

I write this letter with trembling hands, for the first time in five years. The storm is upon us, and I am not certain you will survive it. Write the letter with the weight of the storm, and the fear of the unknown.

I write to you this letter with trembling hands, for the first time in five years. The storm is upon us, and I am not certain of our survival.
